Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( @IsElevatedPermissionOrNotFirstState = 1 OR @IsElevatedPermissionOrNotFirstState IS NULL OR ISNULL(@ID, 0) != 0 ,1,0)

SELECT IIF( ISNULL(@Communication, '') = '' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMRequest AS tic OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) his.* FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = tic.ID AND his.FormIdent = 'ITSMRequest' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'ChangeState' ORDER BY his.CreateDate DESC ) AS hisLast INNER JOIN dbo.Communication AS com ON com.TableID = tic.ID AND com.FormIdent = 'ITSMRequest' AND com.CreateDate >= ISNULL(hisLast.CreateDate, tic.CreateDate) AND com.AccountID = @UserID AND com.CommunicationTypeID = 'Comment_ITSM' WHERE tic.ID = @ID ) , 1, 0)

DataSource.SQL: UPDATE usr.ITSMRequest SET IsBreakdownDone = 1 WHERE ID = @ID

Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( ISNULL(@Communication, '') = '' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMRequest AS tic OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) his.* FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = tic.ID AND his.FormIdent = 'ITSMRequest' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'ChangeState' ORDER BY his.CreateDate DESC ) AS hisLast INNER JOIN dbo.Communication AS com ON com.TableID = tic.ID AND com.FormIdent = 'ITSMRequest' AND com.CreateDate >= ISNULL(hisLast.CreateDate, tic.CreateDate) AND com.AccountID = @UserID AND com.CommunicationTypeID = 'Comment_ITSM' WHERE tic.ID = @ID ) , 1, 0)

DataSource.SQL: UPDATE usr.ITSMApproval SET IsApproved = @ApprovedState , ApproveDateTime = GETDATE() , ApprovedAccountID = @UserID , ApproveComment = @DialogCommunication WHERE TableID = @ID AND FormIdent = @FormIdent AND ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND ApproveOrder = ( SELECT MIN(sub.ApproveOrder) FROM usr.ITSMApproval sub WHERE sub.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND sub.TableID = @ID AND sub.ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND sub.State != 0 AND sub.IsApproved IS NULL ) AND IsApproved IS NULL AND State != 0

Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMApproval WHERE TableID = @ID AND FormIdent = @FormIdent AND ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND IsApproved IS NULL AND State != 0 ) ,1,0 )

DataSource.SQL: UPDATE usr.ITSMRequest SET ActualApproveRoundGuid = NEWID() WHERE ID = @ID

Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( ISNULL(@Communication, '') = '' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMRequest AS tic OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) his.* FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = tic.ID AND his.FormIdent = 'ITSMRequest' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'ChangeState' ORDER BY his.CreateDate DESC ) AS hisLast INNER JOIN dbo.Communication AS com ON com.TableID = tic.ID AND com.FormIdent = 'ITSMRequest' AND com.CreateDate >= ISNULL(hisLast.CreateDate, tic.CreateDate) AND com.AccountID = @UserID AND com.CommunicationTypeID = 'Comment_ITSM' WHERE tic.ID = @ID ) , 1, 0)

DataSource.SQL: UPDATE usr.ITSMApproval SET IsApproved = @ApprovedState , ApproveDateTime = GETDATE() , ApprovedAccountID = @UserID , ApproveComment = @DialogCommunication WHERE TableID = @ID AND FormIdent = @FormIdent AND ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND ApproveOrder = ( SELECT MIN(sub.ApproveOrder) FROM usr.ITSMApproval sub WHERE sub.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND sub.TableID = @ID AND sub.ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND sub.State != 0 AND sub.IsApproved IS NULL ) AND IsApproved IS NULL AND State != 0
UPDATE usr.ITSMRequest SET ActualApproveRoundGuid = NEWID() WHERE ID = @ID
UPDATE usr.ITSMRequest SET IsFirstApproveGenerated = 1 WHERE ID = @ID

Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( ISNULL(@Communication, '') = '' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMRequest AS tic OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) his.* FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = tic.ID AND his.FormIdent = 'ITSMRequest' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'ChangeState' ORDER BY his.CreateDate DESC ) AS hisLast INNER JOIN dbo.Communication AS com ON com.TableID = tic.ID AND com.FormIdent = 'ITSMRequest' AND com.CreateDate >= ISNULL(hisLast.CreateDate, tic.CreateDate) AND com.AccountID = @UserID AND com.CommunicationTypeID = 'Comment_ITSM' WHERE tic.ID = @ID ) , 1, 0)

DataSource.SQL: SELECT @DialogAssignedGroupID

Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( ISNULL(@Communication, '') = '' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMRequest AS tic OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) his.* FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = tic.ID AND his.FormIdent = 'ITSMRequest' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'ChangeState' ORDER BY his.CreateDate DESC ) AS hisLast INNER JOIN dbo.Communication AS com ON com.TableID = tic.ID AND com.FormIdent = 'ITSMRequest' AND com.CreateDate >= ISNULL(hisLast.CreateDate, tic.CreateDate) AND com.AccountID = @UserID AND com.CommunicationTypeID = 'Comment_ITSM' WHERE tic.ID = @ID ) , 1, 0)

DataSource.SQL: SELECT @DialogAssignedGroupID
SELECT @DialogAssignedAccountID
SELECT @UserID
SELECT @DialogAssignedToMyGroupID
SELECT @UserID
SELECT @DialogITSMSolutionSuspendReasonGuid
SELECT @DialogITSMApprovalSuspendReasonGuid
SELECT @DialogITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeGuid
SELECT @DialogSolutionDescription
SELECT @DialogSolutionAditionalInformation
SELECT TOP(1) Guid FROM usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeSetting WHERE FunctionalKey = 'Canceled'

Condition.SQL: SELECT IIF( ISNULL(@Communication, '') = '' AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMRequest AS tic OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) his.* FROM dbo.History AS his WHERE his.TableID = tic.ID AND his.FormIdent = 'ITSMRequest' AND his.HistoryTypeID = 'ChangeState' ORDER BY his.CreateDate DESC ) AS hisLast INNER JOIN dbo.Communication AS com ON com.TableID = tic.ID AND com.FormIdent = 'ITSMRequest' AND com.CreateDate >= ISNULL(hisLast.CreateDate, tic.CreateDate) AND com.AccountID = @UserID AND com.CommunicationTypeID = 'Comment_ITSM' WHERE tic.ID = @ID ) , 1, 0)

DataSource.SQL: SELECT CAST([GUID] AS VARCHAR(MAX)) AS ITSMEntryMethodTypeGuid FROM usr.ITSMEntryMethodTypeSetting WHERE FunctionalKey = 'email' AND [State] != @DeletedState

Condition.SQL: DECLARE @LastTreeIdent VARCHAR(900) = (SELECT COALESCE(@ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, @ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident, @ITSMCompanyIdent)) SELECT IIF( ISNULL(IsBreakdownDone, 0) = 0 AND State = @SolutionAssignedToTeam AND EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMCategory AS cat INNER JOIN dbo.FolderTreeView AS folTre ON folTre.TableID = cat.ID AND folTre.FormIdent = @FormIdent WHERE folTre.Ident = @LastTreeIdent AND ISNULL(cat.IsBreakdown,0) = 1 AND cat.State != @DeletedState ) , 1, 0) FROM usr.ITSMRequest WHERE ID = @ID

SELECT IIF( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMApproval WHERE ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND ApproveRoundStartDateTime IS NULL AND State != 0 ) AND EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMRequest WHERE ID = @ID AND State IN (60,70) ) ,1,0 )

DataSource.SQL:
DECLARE @PermissionIDs dbo.ListNVarchar100Type; INSERT INTO @PermissionIDs VALUES ('ITSMOperator');
DECLARE @UpdateOutput TABLE (OldAssignedGroupID INT, NewAssignedGroupID INT)
UPDATE itsReq SET AssignedGroupID = ISNULL(itsCat.DefaultAssignedGroupID, itsGagbttap.GroupID) OUTPUT DELETED.AssignedGroupID AS OldAssignedGroupID, INSERTED.AssignedGroupID AS NewAssignedGroupID INTO @UpdateOutput (OldAssignedGroupID, NewAssignedGroupID) FROM usr.ITSMRequest AS itsReq LEFT JOIN dbo.FolderTree AS fot ON fot.Ident = COALESCE(itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident) LEFT JOIN dbo.Folder AS fol ON fol.ID = fot.FolderID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMCategory AS itsCat ON itsCat.ID = fol.TableID AND fol.FormIdent = 'ITSMCategory' OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP(1) * FROM usr.ITSM_GetAllowedGroupByFolderTreeAndPermission (COALESCE(itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel5Ident, itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel4Ident, itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel3Ident, itsReq.ITSMCategoryLevel2Ident),@PermissionIDs) ) AS itsGagbttap WHERE itsReq.ID = @ID AND itsReq.[State] = 110 AND itsReq.AssignedGroupID IS NULL
IF EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM @UpdateOutput WHERE ISNULL(OldAssignedGroupID, -1) != ISNULL(NewAssignedGroupID, -1) ) BEGIN
DECLARE @LastHistoryID INT = usr.ITSM_GetLastHistoryID_ByFormIdentTableIDHistoryTypeIDAccountID('ITSMRequest', @ID, 'Save', @UserID)
IF @LastHistoryID IS NOT NULL BEGIN
DECLARE @OldAssignedGroupID VARCHAR(MAX) ,@NewAssignedGroupID VARCHAR(MAX)
SELECT @OldAssignedGroupID = ISNULL(CAST(OldAssignedGroupID AS VARCHAR(MAX)), '') ,@NewAssignedGroupID = ISNULL(CAST(NewAssignedGroupID AS VARCHAR(MAX)), '') FROM @UpdateOutput
EXEC usr.ITSM_HistoryDataInsert @LastHistoryID, 'AssignedGroupID', @OldAssignedGroupID, @NewAssignedGroupID
END
END
SELECT CAST([GUID] AS VARCHAR(MAX)) AS ITSMEntryMethodTypeGuid FROM usr.ITSMEntryMethodTypeSetting WHERE FunctionalKey = 'itsm' AND [State] != @DeletedState
SELECT @UserID AS ReporterAccountID
